emails.theme: NEW: 4mm Ice Chain 14k Gold (Two Tone) + Signature & Kings Clasps
emails.shortDescription: New product launch. Two tone design creates the illusion of a diamond paved chain. Also feature Signature Clasps and Kings Clasps as an add-on.
emails.notes: First email of the month. Brand new product launch. Product page has strong imagery. Mention adding a signature clasp to your chain.
emails.creativeDirection: New launch. Two tone design, illusion of diamond paved chain. Feature the chain solo, then show pairing with Signature Clasp and Kings Clasp. Product page has strong imagery.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY GIFTING: Most Loved Gold Chains, USA Made
emails.product: 1.8mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm Diamond Cut Franco Chains (all USA Made, 14k Gold)
emails.shortDescription: USA Made messaging front and center. Four best selling gold chains crafted in the USA. Father's Day gifting. Superior quality, no import tariffs, better price.
emails.notes: Gold chains focus. Tie to Father's Day. Best sellers featured.
emails.creativeDirection: The gift he'll never take off. Father's Day gifting. Feature most loved USA made gold chains. Best sellers showcase.

emails.product: Chain Breaker Collection (Apex Wolf, Mortis Skull, Regis Lion, Koda Bear, Rajah Tiger)
emails.shortDescription: First time promoting this collection. 36+ diamonds per piece, gemstone eyes, VINCULA FRANGE on every reverse. 5 animals in silver and gold.
emails.notes: Collection spotlight. 10 products across silver and gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes.
emails.creativeDirection: Bold animal spirits shattering their chains. Showcase all 5 animals. Silver and Gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes and lab grown diamond borders (gold).

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: New Arrival, 18K USA Made Chains
emails.product: New 18K USA Made Diamond Cut Franco Chains (1.5mm, 2mm, 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm)
emails.shortDescription: New arrival announcement. 18K gold chains now available in USA made. Just in time for Father's Day. Premium upgrade from 14K.
emails.notes: New arrival. 18K USA made chains launching just in time for Father's Day.
emails.creativeDirection: New arrival energy. 18K gold, USA made, just in time for Father's Day. Premium positioning. Upgrade from 14K.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: For Every Kind of Dad
emails.shortDescription: Personality based gifting guide. The Adventure Dad (Voyager), The Bold Dad (Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker), The Faith Dad (Champion/Redemption/Cross), The Legacy Dad (Memento Mori/Stoic).
emails.notes: Creative, fun angle. Different from standard product showcase. Should feel like a gift guide.
emails.creativeDirection: Personality based gifting. Adventure Dad = Voyager. Bold Dad = Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker. Faith Dad = Champion/Cross. Legacy Dad = Memento Mori/Stoic. Each dad type gets 1 to 2 product picks.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: Last Call Shipping Deadline + Best Sellers
emails.product: CHAMPION Saint Michael, 5mm Gold Franco, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Compass, 3.5mm Gold Franco USA
emails.shortDescription: June 15 is the LAST day to order for Father's Day delivery. Spotlight the five best selling pieces (no platinum focus): CHAMPION Gold Saint Michael, 5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Gold Compass, 3.5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold USA Made.
emails.notes: Shipping deadline urgency + best sellers (client changed focus from platinum to best sellers on Jun 15).
emails.creativeDirection: Shipping deadline urgency. Order today for guaranteed delivery. Feature five client-specified best sellers: CHAMPION Gold Saint Michael (featured), 5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Gold Compass, 3.5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold USA Made. Nick founder voice, Shop Now CTAs, no pricing, no platinum messaging.

emails.product: Stoic 4 Virtues Pendant (Yellow Gold, Gold, Silver, Platinum)
emails.shortDescription: YouTube feature for the Stoic 4 Virtues pendant. Hero = the video thumbnail, linked to youtu.be/Kb2I_6Cnbsg, with the video title as the headline and the description in Nick voice. Then all four metal versions (Yellow Gold, Gold, Silver, Platinum), the four virtues, and the Marcus Aurelius engraving.
emails.notes: YouTube feature, video IN FOCUS. Video: Stoicism Meaning and the 4 Stoic Virtues to Become Unshakable (https://youtu.be/Kb2I_6Cnbsg). Thumbnail = hero. Title = hero headline. Description woven into Nick note. 4 metal versions after the video (Yellow Gold, Gold, Silver, Platinum), each own Shop Now.
emails.creativeDirection: Video in focus: thumbnail hero + title + description (Nick voice). Four metal versions after the video, separate Shop Now each. Compass rose + Marcus Aurelius quote. No pricing, no dashes.

emails.product: CHAMPION Silver Saint Michael Pendant, Faith Silver Cross Pendant, 5mm/4mm/3mm Silver Franco Chains
emails.shortDescription: Silver edition of Summer Standouts. Editorial Most Loved countdown of 5 silver pieces (2 pendants + 3 Franco chain widths). Nick voice, no pricing, separate Shop Now per piece. Layout mirrors David Yurman Most Loved edit.
emails.notes: Silver focused version of Summer Standouts. Fresh summer energy.
emails.creativeDirection: Summer standouts, silver edition. Most loved silver pieces. Accessible luxury, summer ready. Fresh energy.

emails.product: Lion & Skull Crest, Majesty Crown (Diamonds+Rubies), Skull Gold Signet, Lux Gold Diamond Band, Dragon Gold (Diamonds), Reign Gold Lion
emails.shortDescription: Gold rings spotlight (6 gold rings, no platinum). Rewritten body copy. Nick voice, no pricing.
emails.notes: Rings have not been featured in a dedicated email recently.
emails.creativeDirection: Dedicated rings spotlight. Full range from statement rings to wedding bands. Gold and platinum.

emails.product: 3mm, 4mm, 5mm Silver Franco Chains, 10mm Silver Franco Chain (Lion & Snake Clasp)
emails.shortDescription: Silver Franco chain series by width (3mm to 10mm). Crafted in Italy, solid sterling silver, rhodium plated, stamped .925. Nick voice, no pricing.
emails.notes: Silver focused. Broader appeal, lower price points. Shop by category approach.
emails.creativeDirection: Silver by category. Shop by chain style, pendant collection, ring style. Entry price points. Summer ready.
